title: Ramblers Salesforce API (day-one, nbarrett/ngx-ramblers#209)
description: Consolidated JSON Schema for the data types defined in ngx-ramblers issue #209. Source of truth is the issue body; this file is kept in sync by scripts/check-schema-drift.ts.

SalesforceMember.description: A single member record returned by the Salesforce API.

salesforceId.description: Salesforce record ID. Always present; allows addressing non-member Salesforce contacts in future.

membershipNumber.description: Unique identifier for paid-up members. Required in practice for current scope; not in the required array because it may be absent for non-member Salesforce contacts if the API scope widens later.

preferredName.description: Member's chosen salutation name (e.g. "Charlie" rather than "Charles"). New field — HQ must add to Salesforce.

email.description: Email address. Not all members have one.

groupCode.description: 4-character primary group code. Kept for Insight Hub parity; the authoritative per-group shape is `groupMemberships[]` below.

memberTerm.description: Whether membership is life or annual.

membershipType.description: Member / affiliate classification. Amended 2026-04-20: renamed from `type` for unambiguity against `memberType`.

groupMemberships.description: Per-group memberships and roles. Amended 2026-04-13: introduces per-group role scope; replaces the standalone top-level `walkLeader` flag. Today CO data expresses one primary group plus up to one affiliate (see `Affiliate Member Primary Group`); the collection generalises this cleanly. Send rights only flow from the entry with `primary: true`.

primary.description: True if this is the member's primary group membership; false for affiliate memberships (recipient-only).

roles.description: Three-state boolean map. `true` = role granted, `false` = explicitly not granted, absent = CO does not yet populate this flag.

walkLeader.description: Trained and active walk leader (3-module training complete).

emailSender.description: Authorised to send emails on behalf of this group. New role; presumably gated by a training module HQ would introduce.

viewMembershipData.description: Member is authorised to work with member data for this group (Data Protection training + HQ role grant). Amended 2026-04-20: renamed from `membershipSecretary` to describe the capability rather than a specific role title.

areaMemberships.description: Per-area memberships and roles. Amended 2026-04-13. Parallels `groupMemberships`; `emailSender` at area scope authorises sending across all groups within that area.

emailSender.description: Authorised to send on behalf of this area.

affiliateMemberPrimaryGroup.description: Primary group for affiliate members (flat Insight Hub field retained for parity; the structural equivalent is `groupMemberships[].primary`).

emailMarketingConsent.description: GDPR email consent flag for Central Office emails.

groupMarketingConsent.description: Consent to receive emails from their local group. New — HQ must create in Salesforce.

areaMarketingConsent.description: Consent to receive emails from their area. New — HQ must create in Salesforce.

otherMarketingConsent.description: Consent to receive emails from groups other than their own. New — HQ must create in Salesforce.

totalCount.description: Total number of members in the group.

since.description: Echoed back when the request used incremental sync.

changes.description: Incremental changes. Only present when the since parameter was provided.

removalReason.description: Why the member was removed from this group. Only present when changeType is "removed". See Group Transfers section below.

source.description: System that originated this consent update.

success.description: Whether the update was successfully persisted.
